properties.name: asapp.security.jwt-secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key for JWT signing and verification.

properties.name: asapp.security.access-token.expiration-time
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: asapp.security.refresh-token.expiration-time
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: asapp.security.jwt.cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Enables the JWT cleanup scheduled task.

properties.name: asapp.security.jwt.cleanup.cron-expression
properties.description: Cron expression for the JWT cleanup scheduled task.
